expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add persistent notification inbox controls and filtering.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read state stored between sessions so that read and unread choices remain consistent when I return.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification storage tracks whether each notification is read or unread",
        "Existing notifications default to unread unless marked otherwise",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/schema/notifications.sql",
        "src/server/notifications/repository.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Expose notification read state in shared data",
      "description": "As a developer, I want notification list responses to include read state so that UI surfaces can render unread indicators consistently.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification API responses include read-state information for each notification",
        "Shared notification types represent read and unread values consistently",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/shared/notification.ts",
        "src/server/notifications/serializers.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show unread badge entry point",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge on the notification entry point so that I can tell when new notifications need attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "The notification entry point shows an unread count badge when unread items exist",
        "The badge count updates after notification read state changes",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/notifications/NotificationBell.tsx",
        "src/ui/notifications/useUnreadCount.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Open notification list surface",
      "description": "As a user, I want to open a notification list so that I can review my recent notifications in one place.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Users can open a notification center list from the notification entry point",
        "The list shows notifications with visible read or unread state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/notifications/NotificationCenter.tsx",
        "src/ui/notifications/NotificationList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Mark notifications read or unread",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark individual notifications read or unread so that I can manage which items still need attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each notification supports toggling between read and unread states",
        "Changing read state persists immediately and updates visible unread indicators",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/updateReadState.ts",
        "src/ui/notifications/NotificationRow.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Filter notifications by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread work or review completed items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "The notification center exposes All, Unread, and Read filters",
        "Selecting a filter shows only notifications matching the chosen read state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/notifications/NotificationFilters.tsx",
        "src/ui/notifications/NotificationList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that completed items stop cluttering the notification center.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "The notification center exposes an action to clear all read notifications",
        "Clearing read notifications removes only notifications already marked read",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/clearReadNotifications.ts",
        "src/ui/notifications/ClearReadButton.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
